page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: S-Lang allows developers to create robust multi-platform software
page_metadata.biotools__summary: SLANG (Simple Long-read loci Assembly of Nanopore data for Genotyping) is a Python script pipeline for locus assembly, orthology estimation and SNP extraction of Nanopore-sequenced multi-locus data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SLANG (Simple Long-read loci Assembly of Nanopore data for Genotyping) is a Python script pipeline for locus assembly, orthology estimation and SNP extraction of Nanopore-sequenced multi-locus data.
